messages.message: Unnecessary conditional, expected left-hand side of `??` operator to be possibly null or undefined.
Unnecessary optional chain on a non-nullish value.
'filterEntries' is defined but never used. Allowed unused vars must match /^_/u.
Arrow function has a complexity of 12. Maximum allowed is 8.
Unnecessary conditional, value is always falsy.
